use_cases: Displaying confirmation dialogs for user actions like delete or submit
Showing forms, images, or detailed content in an overlay without page navigation
Revealing contextual information triggered by button clicks
Creating animated modal experiences for better user engagement
Displaying privacy policies, terms of service, or legal information
ai_summary: An animated modal overlay component built with Radix UI Dialog and Framer Motion, featuring smooth open/close transitions with fade effects. The component captures the trigger button's position for potential origin-based animations and provides a backdrop overlay with click-to-close functionality. Styled with Tailwind CSS using an indigo color scheme, it's a reusable modal solution for displaying content, forms, or confirmations as an overlay on top of page content.
